summary: Iteration 28 testing COMPLETE. All features working correctly including the critical SHAPE GRADIENT FIX from iteration 27. The ShapeRenderer now uses backgroundImage CSS property instead of background shorthand, and gradients display correctly on all shapes (square, circle, triangle, star, ring). Chart tool creates proper SVG charts with axes, grid, and labels. All 12 features tested and verified functional.
critical_code_review_comments: ShapeRenderer gradient fix confirmed working - using backgroundImage property instead of background shorthand (CanvasArea.js lines 86-87)
Chart tool SVG generation is robust with proper axes, grid lines, value labels, and category labels
All 47 toolbar tools have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Templates panel shows 20 templates organized in 8 categories
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 28 features verified working. Shape gradient bug from iteration 27 is FIXED. The fix was in ShapeRenderer component - changed from `background` CSS shorthand to `backgroundImage` property for gradient rendering. Login: demo@demo.com/demo123. Create document: Dashboard -> 'New Document' -> 'Create Document'. Canvas selector: [data-testid='canvas-page-0']. Tool selectors: [data-testid='tool-{toolname}'].

rca_of_issue.root_cause: ShapeRenderer was using CSS `background` shorthand which doesn't work well with dynamic gradient values in React. Changed to `backgroundImage` property.
rca_of_issue.fix_verified: YES - Gradients now render correctly on all shapes
